description: A local business wants to purchase 10 identical cargo vans for their delivery fleet.

nodes.task_description: Identify the business's needs and recommend the appropriate vehicle model and configuration.
Check inventory and factory availability to fulfill an order for 10 units.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent determines the order will need to be a factory order.

nodes.task_description: Generate a fleet sales quote, applying any available volume discounts.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a formal quote with fleet pricing.

nodes.task_description: Process the fleet sale agreement and place the factory order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully completes the sale and submits the order.
